en: Is your company required to pay IMSS Employer Worker Quotas, Contributions and Amortizations?\n\n
The company does not have any employees
The company is foreign and does not have fiscal presence or any employees in Mexico
Please upload a copy of your bank receipt proof of payment to IMSS made the given month (for the activity of the previous month).
Please upload a copy of the Format for Payment of Employer Worker Quotas, Contributions and Amortizations for the given month (for the activity of the previous month).

I hereby certify that, to the best of my knowledge, the provided information is true and accurate.
